nasb.text: “These are the statutes and the judgments which you shall carefully observe in the land which the Lord, the God of your fathers, has given you to possess as long as you live on the earth.

esv.text: “These are the statutes and rules that you shall be careful to do in the land that the Lord, the God of your fathers, has given you to possess, all the days that you live on the earth.

cnv.text: “你們活在地上的一切日子，在耶和華你列祖的　神賜給你作產業的地上，要謹守遵行的律例和典章，就是這些：

ccb.text: “只要你们生活在你们祖先的上帝耶和华赐给你们的土地上，就要谨遵以下律例和典章。
